title: Make Me Whole Again
description: Lets you craft stairs, slabs and walls back to their corresponding blocks!
body:
![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/hX9GrKKe?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=blueviolet) ![CurseForge Datapack Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1120781?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&label=Datapack%20Downloads&color=blueviolet) ![CurseForge Mod Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1530849?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&label=Mod%20Downloads&color=blueviolet) ![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/hX9GrKKe?style=for-the-badge&label=Latest%20release&color=chartreuse) ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/AI-AI?style=for-the-badge&label=Never%20by&color=red) [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord%20server%20-%20Discord?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=Join%20the&color=royalblue&link=https%3A%2F%2Fdiscord.gg%2FDGVD6wBTDF)](https://discord.gg/DGVD6wBTDF)
# About Datapack / Mod **Make Me Whole Again (MMWA)** adds a plenty of new recipes that allow to craft stairs, slabs and walls back to their corresponding blocks. Got to many stairs or crafted way too much slabs? That's not a problem anymore! ## Recipes This datapack / mod introduces A LOT of new recipes that allows you to craft stairs, slabs, carpets and walls back to blocks. For more information, check the sections below. ### Stairs To craft stairs back to blocks, place them in a 2x2 square pattern in the crafting and you'll get 3 corresponding blocks. ![Image that shows how to craft stairs back to blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e9d4bc9ae2c9f0f38a39447630f1dea01f0848b.png) ### Slabs To craft slabs back to blocks, place them in a 2x1 rectangle pattern in the crafting and you'll get a corresponding block. ![Image that shows how to craft slabs back to a block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fd7fbed225b55bc8d11e429e20233330f403143.png) ### Snow To craft snow layers back to snow blocks, place them in a 2x1 rectangle pattern in the crafting - similar to slabs - and you'll get a snow block. ![Image that shows how to craft snow back to snow block.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d682d6e00efd2fb99363ee5b3f5e2be5b649d8df.png) ### Carpets To craft carpets (including moss carpets) back to blocks, place them in 3x1 rectangle pattern in the crafting and you'll get a wool or moss block. ![Image that shows how to craft carpets back to blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a140989e3149b7782520ee7c05f4936c9023722.png) ### Walls To craft walls back to blocks, place a wall in any slot of the crafting and you'll get a corresponding block. ![Image that shows how to craft wall back to a block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0d02b6334130736cc2b25e2cb6aec5fd2e539a0.png) ### Conflicts To avoid any conflicts with existing Minecraft recipes, I had to change the way you craft chiseled blocks. To craft them, replace slabs with blocks, as shown at the image below. The only exception is a chiseled quartz block. To craft it, place quartz blocks in 2x2 square. ![Image that shows how to craft chiseled variants of blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91c57870890f39d4c70777ae544a2cc4ff5df90c.png) ## Future datapack / mod support I plan on updating this project once new **full** releases of Minecraft comes out. ## Compatibility with other mods If you want some extra compatibility for blocks introduced with **other mods**, let me know on **Discord** and I will release additional add-ons giving compatibility with desired mods!
